title: gather-execution-context requires a context-contract entry
description: gather-execution-context requires a context-contract entry for the unit kind. Without one, it returns 'no context-contract for kind: requirement'. Context contracts are not auto-generated. The author must manually create a CTX-NNN entry for each unit kind they want to gather context for.
actual_behavior: gather-execution-context with unitId REQ-001 and kind requirement returns: { error: 'no context-contract for kind: requirement' }
expected_behavior: A default context contract could be inferred from the block kind schema (all relation types the kind participates in, with default depth 1). Or an auto-generate tool.
reproduction: 1. Create a requirement. 2. Call gather-execution-context with kind=requirement without first creating a context-contract. 3. Observe error.
workaround: Manually create a CTX-NNN entry in the context-contracts block before calling gather-execution-context.
